---
title: "Hakkımda"
sidebar: false 
---

![](assets/images/pp.png){fig-align="center" width="250"}

# Eğitim

-   B.S., Electric and Electronic Engineering, Kirikkale University, Turkey.
-   M.S., Engineering Management, Hacettepe University, Turkey.

# İş Tecrübesi

## Employements

1.  Panda Network, Full-Stack Developer 2021, 2023

2.  Cambria, Full-Stack Developer 2022, 2023

3.  BK Mobil, Full-Stack Developer 2023, 2024

4.  GoIT, Education Mentor 2024, 2025

5.  FONET IT, Senior Frontend Developer 2025, present

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python, HTML, CSS, Javascript, Typescript, Tailwind CSS, NodeJs, NestJs, ReactJs, Svelte, VueJs

# Hobbies

Trekking, Camping, DJing / Music Mixing\
\

## CV

<a href="assets/files/GokhanKaraoglu_Resume.pdf" download class="btn btn-primary"> Download CV </a>
